title: elaeagnus umbellata f. rotundifolia
intro: Elaeagnus umbellata f. rotundifolia is a variant of the silverberry or wolfberry plant, which is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The leaves, bark, and berries of this plant possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Elaeagnus umbellata f. rotundifolia include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
